name: MOSAIC large released-alphabet scaling v1
purpose: Test computational feasibility and certified retention beyond released alphabet L=4 using exact attacker separation with constraint generation.
claim_boundary: Synthetic finite-token tables isolate optimization and certification scaling. They do not establish natural-shift frequency, real feature quality, or production latency.

settings.decoder_rule: one fixed balanced binary decoder per released alphabet

reporting: every job including failures or timeouts
full and active attacker assignment counts
certified source advantage and worst-stratum error
retention by source count and released alphabet
